creator: sju@wol.no
text:
LPRng port has a checksum mismatch and patch.aj doesn't apply cleanly
for  LPRng-3.7.5  (on numerous machines even...)

Port build output: 

hamz:/usr/ports/sysutils/LPRng# make all
===>  Extracting for LPRng-3.7.5

Fix: 

regenerate checksum and patch.aj from known good src.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/sysutils/LPRng && make all
